creatorMonthly.description: Recurring credits for active creators who publish and iterate every month.

creatorYearly.description: Lower annual cost for creators running long-term course operations and stable traffic.

creatorLarge.description: A larger refill for seasonal launches, campaign bursts, or heavy preview traffic.

creatorSmall.description: A flexible one-time refill for short spikes, workshops, or low-balance recovery.
creatorSmall.title: Starter top-up pack
